result.stdout:
Usage: groupdocs-metadata [command] [source-file] [options]

Arguments:
 [command] can be: 
 export - export file metadata to a specified 'output-format'. The default value is 'XML'.
 remove - remove metadata from a file.
 copy - copy metadata between two files of the same type.
 find - find metadata properties in a file.

Options:
 -h|--help         Display help.
 --version         Display CLI version in use.
